gamerule.actually-invisible.mob_can_dete: Restores vanilla behavior where mobs can spot invisible players at close range.
gamerule.actually-invisible.mob_can_reac: Allows mobs to fight back if attacked by an invisible player.
gamerule.actually-invisible.is_gear_visi: Display armor and held items on invisible players. You always see your own gear
gamerule.actually-invisible.bubble_visib: The distance in blocks that invisibility bubble particles are visible to others. Set to 0 to disable.
